recent_60_samples.prompt: My presentation slides still need a lot of work.
recent_60_samples.answer: You should finish your slides before tonight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you check with the front desk about the parking pass?
recent_60_samples.answer: I was unsure if the parking pass had arrived yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you find out about the internship deadline?
recent_60_samples.answer: I figured out whether the application had closed.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you sign up for the ski trip?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not paid the trip deposit yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear about the dining hall changes?
recent_60_samples.answer: The salad bar on the first floor was finally reopened after the renovation.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the coach say about practice today?
recent_60_samples.answer: Practice moved to the indoor courts because of rain.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I've never been to the career fair before.
recent_60_samples.answer: What should I bring to the career fair?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you finish moving into the new apartment?
recent_60_samples.answer: The friend who helped me move canceled at the last minute.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you finish your essay?
recent_60_samples.answer: I submitted it right before the deadline.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you talk to Professor Cho about the extension?
recent_60_samples.answer: I checked whether the final paper deadline could be moved to next week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you finished writing up the experiment?
recent_60_samples.answer: I haven't finished my lab report yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I can't find the tickets for tonight's show.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where did you leave the concert tickets?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Do you know if we can use the seminar room?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked Hector whether the seminar room was booked.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you see Margot at the library earlier?
recent_60_samples.answer: I couldn't tell whether Margot had left already.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I thought Emma was coming to study with us.
recent_60_samples.answer: You didn't invite Emma to the study session.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You mentioned trying out a new student group.
recent_60_samples.answer: Olivia joined the club that meets on weekends.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you sort out your campus parking permit?
recent_60_samples.answer: I've picked up my parking pass this week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I finally met with my academic advisor today.
recent_60_samples.answer: What did the advisor tell you about registration?

recent_60_samples.prompt: You seemed curious about Mariana's project status.
recent_60_samples.answer: I found out whether Mariana had already submitted the final report.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just got feedback on my seminar essay.
recent_60_samples.answer: The professor who taught the seminar praised my final research essay.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard you weren't in class earlier.
recent_60_samples.answer: I missed the entire morning biology lecture.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You looked like you needed something at the front desk.
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked whether the gym stays open late tonight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Your roommate seemed worried about the printer.
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know if the printer was fixed.

recent_60_samples.prompt: The librarian says your account has a hold.
recent_60_samples.answer: I haven't returned the overdue library books yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You mentioned the study group meeting moved.
recent_60_samples.answer: The tutor who runs our study group rescheduled everything.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just got back from returning our vehicle.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where did you park the rental car?

recent_60_samples.prompt: You told me you got feedback on your paper.
recent_60_samples.answer: My economics professor praised the detailed research paper that I submitted.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You seem relieved about the parking situation.
recent_60_samples.answer: I've finally picked up my new campus parking permit.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You noticed the second floor is open again.
recent_60_samples.answer: The reading room on the second floor was finally reopened to students.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Your advisor asked about the apartment lease.
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked if my apartment lease was ready.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I saw you running for the bus stop.
recent_60_samples.answer: I caught the early shuttle to campus.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You wanted to check something with the registrar.
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked if the deadline had already passed.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Your advisor seemed curious about your plans.
recent_60_samples.answer: He wanted to know whether I had chosen a major.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You mentioned the trip sign-up is filling up.
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not paid the field trip deposit yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You were talking to someone about the noise.
recent_60_samples.answer: The neighbor who filed a noise complaint apologized quickly.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard the workshop schedule changed this week.
recent_60_samples.answer: When does your writing workshop start on Monday?

recent_60_samples.prompt: You showed me your presentation diagram.
recent_60_samples.answer: My biology instructor praised the well-labeled diagram that I created for class.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You seem excited about the new equipment.
recent_60_samples.answer: I've already tried the new rowing machine this week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You noticed the cafeteria looks different.
recent_60_samples.answer: The salad bar near my dorm was recently renovated.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You were waiting on news about your thesis.
recent_60_samples.answer: I found out whether my thesis draft was approved.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where did you leave your notebook?
recent_60_samples.answer: I left my notebook in the dining hall.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just transferred here as a commuter.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where can I buy a parking permit?

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Emma ask you about the concert?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know if the tickets sold out.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you returned the lab projector yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: I haven't returned the borrowed projector yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you get your charger back from your classmate?
recent_60_samples.answer: The classmate who borrowed my charger finally returned it.

recent_60_samples.prompt: We really needed a bigger space for the club.
recent_60_samples.answer: We've moved the meeting to a bigger room.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Hector ask you at the museum?
recent_60_samples.answer: He asked whether the museum offered a student discount.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you catch an early train this morning?
recent_60_samples.answer: I packed my bags and caught the early train.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I'm worried about our final exam date.
recent_60_samples.answer: Your final exam timetable was posted outside the department office yesterday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did the department tell you the lecture location?
recent_60_samples.answer: I still needed to find out where the guest lecture would take place.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you dropped off the registration forms?
recent_60_samples.answer: I've dropped the forms at the front desk.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I want to get more involved on campus.
recent_60_samples.answer: How do I join the debate club?

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Mariana ask you in the dining hall?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wondered whether the café accepted meal cards.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you finalized your dorm paperwork yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: I didn't sign the new housing agreement.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you go to the tutoring session today?
recent_60_samples.answer: The tutor who runs your lab canceled today's session.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I wanted to beat the weekend rush.
recent_60_samples.answer: I've picked up my textbooks before the weekend rush.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did you learn about the bookstore's schedule?
recent_60_samples.answer: I found out whether the bookstore had extended its hours.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you take a break between your classes?
recent_60_samples.answer: I grabbed a coffee and reviewed my notes.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did the new machines arrive for our lab?
recent_60_samples.answer: Your new lab equipment was delivered to the science building yesterday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Julian ask you about the internship?
recent_60_samples.answer: He was wondering how many credits your internship would count.
